service_center: East Coast E-Bike Warranty Claims Repair Center LLC

diagnostics.action: Check battery voltage compatibility. Ensure the controller logic matches the battery pack output.
Test the 5V rail on the controller. Check internal motor Hall sensor alignment and phase wire soldering.
Inspect thermal paste and MOSFET mounting. Check for phase shorts causing high resistance.
Board-level diagnostic required: Check the shunt resistors and current sensing circuit on the controller.
Verify magnet placement on the spokes. Inspect the sensor-to-controller connector for pins backing out.
Logic failure: Check green Higo connector pins. Test for 5V at the display lead to verify controller communication.
